title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・リグレット

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide runs her best race ever... but it still
isn't enough to win the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If the venue for the race hadn't been changed,
Biwa Hayahide could've maximized the results of
her equation and maybe even won...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide wants to be the greatest of her
generation and eventually defeat Narita Brian, so
she isn't satisfied with her current performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why our next goal is the Takarazuka Kinen,
where only the best are chosen to race. We begin
working hard, so Biwa Hayahide can improve
even more.
